title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is ON
scenario: "Share Data" toggle remains ON after app restart when enabled during onboarding via "Continue as Guest"
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or clear app data to trigger onboarding).
2. On the onboarding screen, tap "Continue as Guest".
3. When prompted, select the option to share data (enable the data sharing toggle).
4. Complete the onboarding flow and reach the Home screen.
5. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → Account → Share Data.
6. Verify the "Share Data" toggle is ON.
7. Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → Account → Share Data.
10. Observe the state of the "Share Data" toggle.
expected: The "Share Data" toggle remains ON after restarting the app.
